scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/daemon && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/web && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/cli
scripts.dev:daemon: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run dev --workspace @cc-switch-web/daemon
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run dev --workspace @cc-switch-web/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @cc-switch-web/daemon && npm run typecheck --workspace @cc-switch-web/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @cc-switch-web/cli
